title: A New Age of War Is Declared
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Gerd, Loki as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A few minutes earlier -- the realm of the dead

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AAAAA- HHAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I jumped without thinking!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I jumped without thinking!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait!! I gotta stay calm!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can do this! I can do this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I can't let him die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whooo- AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Guard Point!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want to hear about it, get on your knees, Rajrudin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You killed my father, Lok!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He was my dad, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And look what you did! To your own parent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop it, HA3RJIN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey!! I hope, just for down

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you see him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right... something definitely just fell down here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's just past that ridge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait... How did I know it was chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Someone's with him, but they're hurt...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: something serious must be happening if they fell all the way from the realm of the sun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's go find them right away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Gerd and Goldberg, is there anything you want us to fetch on the way?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Like someone's head or some jewels?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's something I want...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, Loki, we're not going to set you free!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No need to be so serious...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: RING RING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Whoa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: MOSA!! I'm busy, let's chat later!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Mangle... Nangle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll be quick...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have my hands full here too... I just have one thing to say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fine, just keep your voice down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Earlier... I didn't get the chance to tell you before, but... the truth is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it looks like I'm not going to be able to use a transgender snail for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What?! did something happen?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At first, I was just scared. But before I knew it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I found our conversations to be a calming experience, and I wouldn't trade them for anything.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I wanted to thank you again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is this?! Is something happening to you?!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
